files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections as indicated by the Roman numerals. The first lesson is complete with questions, the second is just a title, the third is a substantial genealogy lesson on English history, and the fourth is a home economics lesson on fabric care. The file appears to end with an advertisement for a Columbia Grafonola.
